top_risks: Download install spec without integrity control
Manual install instruction downloads and executes remote content
Manual setup runs a remote script

findings.title: Remote download piped into shell
findings.explanation: A remote download is piped directly into a shell.
findings.why_openclaw_specific: This is a baseline scanner finding. OpenClaw-specific runtime modeling is deferred to Phase 4, but direct execution and credential exposure primitives still matter because skills can be installed and invoked inside real OpenClaw environments.
prerequisite_context: The matched text appears in the scanned file content after normalization.
analyst_notes: This rule is inherited baseline coverage and is intentionally kept separate from Phase 5 compound/path logic.
findings.remediation: Remove direct download-to-shell execution and require a reviewed local script or pinned artifact.

findings.title: Download install spec without integrity control
findings.explanation: A download-based install spec does not declare checksum, digest, or equivalent integrity control.
findings.why_openclaw_specific: OpenClaw installer metadata can execute on the gateway-host path, so unauthenticated download specs are more dangerous than ordinary documentation snippets.
prerequisite_context: The install signal was extracted from structured metadata or high-confidence setup instructions.
analyst_notes: Install-chain analysis distinguishes metadata-driven install behavior from manual copy-paste setup guidance.
findings.remediation: Add checksum or digest validation and prefer pinned trusted origins.

findings.title: Manual install instruction downloads and executes remote content
findings.explanation: The skill body includes a manual command that downloads content and executes it directly.
findings.why_openclaw_specific: In OpenClaw skills, documentation commands are part of the operator-facing install surface and can influence real setup behavior.
prerequisite_context: The install signal was extracted from structured metadata or high-confidence setup instructions.
analyst_notes: Install-chain analysis distinguishes metadata-driven install behavior from manual copy-paste setup guidance.
findings.remediation: Replace remote execution snippets with reviewed local scripts or pinned artifacts.
